notes:
v1.0.26 — Full Windows Explorer context menu parity

• Open in new window — opens any file/folder in a new KRB Explorer window
• Pin to Quick access — same as Add to Favorites
• Give access to — opens Windows sharing wizard
• Restore previous versions — opens Windows Previous Versions dialog
• Scan with Windows Defender — scans selected items for viruses
• Pin to Start — pins folder/file to the Windows Start menu
• Format… — appears for drive roots, opens Windows format dialog
• New → Text Document — creates a new .txt file inline with rename
• New → Shortcut — creates a .lnk shortcut for any item
• New → Folder, New → Text Document also in empty-space right-click menu
• Open in Terminal, Open with VS Code grouped together
• All previous actions preserved
